title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting all rules
description: Verify that a user can create an account using a unique email address (e.g., user@example.com) and a password that is 8-12 characters long, includes at least one number, one special character, and one alphabet character (e.g., Pass1@abc). The system should accept the input and store the account data in the database.

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters meeting complexity
description: Verify that a password of exactly 8 characters (e.g., Abc1@xyz) containing at least one number, one special character, and one alphabet is accepted for account creation.

title: Account creation with password exactly 12 characters meeting complexity
description: Verify that a password of exactly 12 characters (e.g., Abc1@xyz1234) containing at least one number, one special character, and one alphabet is accepted for account creation.

title: Account creation with email exactly 255 characters
description: Verify that an email address of exactly 255 characters (e.g., a...@b.c where total length is 255) is accepted for account creation, provided it is unique and password meets all rules.

title: Reject duplicate email during account creation
description: Verify that attempting to create an account with an email address that already exists in the database results in a validation failure and displays a meaningful inline error message (e.g., 'This email is already registered').

title: Reject password shorter than 8 characters
description: Verify that a password of length 7 characters (e.g., Abc1@xy) is rejected with an inline error message indicating the minimum length requirement.

title: Reject password longer than 12 characters
description: Verify that a password of length 13 characters (e.g., Abc1@xyz12345) is rejected with an inline error message indicating the maximum length requirement.

title: Reject password missing a number
description: Verify that a password with no numeric character (e.g., Abc@defgh) is rejected with an inline error message indicating that at least one number is required.

title: Reject password missing a special character
description: Verify that a password with no special character (e.g., Abc1defgh) is rejected with an inline error message indicating that at least one special character is required.

title: Reject password missing an alphabet character
description: Verify that a password with no alphabet character (e.g., 123@4567) is rejected with an inline error message indicating that at least one alphabet character is required.

title: Reject email exceeding 255 characters
description: Verify that an email address longer than 255 characters (e.g., 256 characters) is rejected with an inline error message indicating the maximum length limit.

title: Verify password is not stored in plaintext in the database
description: After successful account creation, verify that the stored password in the database is not in plaintext (e.g., appears as a hash or encrypted value). This can be validated by inspecting the database record directly.

title: Attempt to bypass email verification before first login
description: Verify that a user who has not completed email verification cannot log in. Attempt to log in with valid credentials before the email is verified and confirm that access is denied with an appropriate error message.

title: SQL injection attempt on email field during account creation
description: Verify that entering a malicious SQL injection string (e.g., ' OR '1'='1) in the email field does not bypass validation or create an account, and the system handles it securely without exposing database errors.

title: SQL injection attempt on password field during account creation
description: Verify that entering a malicious SQL injection string (e.g., '; DROP TABLE users; --) in the password field does not compromise the database, and the system rejects the input or handles it securely.

title: Inline error message displayed for duplicate email
description: Verify that when a duplicate email is entered, a meaningful inline error message (e.g., 'This email is already registered') appears next to the email field before form submission or after validation.

title: Inline error message displayed for password too short
description: Verify that when a password shorter than 8 characters is entered, a meaningful inline error message (e.g., 'Password must be at least 8 characters') appears next to the password field.

title: Inline error message displayed for password too long
description: Verify that when a password longer than 12 characters is entered, a meaningful inline error message (e.g., 'Password must not exceed 12 characters') appears next to the password field.

title: Inline error message displayed for missing number in password
description: Verify that when a password without a number is entered, a meaningful inline error message (e.g., 'Password must contain at least one number') appears next to the password field.

title: Inline error message displayed for missing special character in password
description: Verify that when a password without a special character is entered, a meaningful inline error message (e.g., 'Password must contain at least one special character') appears next to the password field.

title: Inline error message displayed for missing alphabet in password
description: Verify that when a password without an alphabet character is entered, a meaningful inline error message (e.g., 'Password must contain at least one alphabet character') appears next to the password field.

title: Inline error message displayed for email exceeding 255 characters
description: Verify that when an email longer than 255 characters is entered, a meaningful inline error message (e.g., 'Email must not exceed 255 characters') appears next to the email field.

title: Email verification link is sent after successful account creation
description: Verify that after successful account creation, the system triggers an email verification mechanism (e.g., sends a confirmation link or OTP) to the registered email address.

title: Email verification token expires after a defined period
description: Verify that the email verification token (e.g., link or OTP) expires after a certain time (e.g., 24 hours) and cannot be used for verification after expiration.

title: Resend email verification functionality works
description: Verify that a user can request to resend the email verification (e.g., via a 'Resend verification email' button) and a new verification link or OTP is sent to the registered email.
